subject: Luvale
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Hana lumbunwiso yamazu kweseka najila vanawazachisamo mumikuku
topics: Valongi vanalinangula lumbunwiso yamazu najila yakuwazachisa mumikuku.
Kujimbula: Valongi navatanga mujimbu nakuwivwishisa kaha kusongo navakumbulula
